name: @finch_ren/x-scraper
description: A TypeScript SDK for X (Twitter) internal GraphQL endpoints with cookie-based authentication.

scripts.generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -g typescript-fetch -i openapi/openapi.yaml -o src/openapi --config scripts/generator-config.yaml
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npx tscpaths -p tsconfig.build.json -s . -o ./dist && mkdir -p dist/openapi && cp openapi/placeholder.json dist/openapi/placeholder.json
